body_txt: Looks like it's the end of the line, Woobie . All the characters with awesome action skills aren't going to come save you. They just get to watch while I brutalize you so as to kick me a few notches up the villain ladder. No . What was that? I can't— BLAFGH! That sound you just heard is what happens when a character who is assumed to be weak and helpless compared to their stronger counterparts in a setting won't give in. Yes, narrative convention assumes that they will fail to successfully resist, but to hell with that. They're going down kicking and screaming (or snarking), and absolutely won't let the villain enjoy the sadism that they expected . When unsuccessful, it can lead to either some talk about the reason why you suck , things going even more wrong , or tragic results . Spoilers abound . See also Beware the Nice Ones , Damsel out of Distress , Iron Woobie , Submissive Badass , and Underestimating Badassery .
